error.invalid_url: The bridge URL must start with http:// or https://.

data_description.bridge_url: URL of the Claude CLI addon bridge API (e.g. http://localhost:8099).
data_description.shared_secret: The shared secret from the addon logs. SSH into the addon and run: cat /data/shared_secret

user.description: Connect to the Claude CLI addon bridge. If the addon was auto-discovered, the URL is pre-filled.

data_description.shared_secret: The shared secret from the addon. SSH into the addon and run: cat /data/shared_secret

hassio_confirm.description: The Claude CLI addon ({addon}) was discovered. Enter the shared secret to complete setup.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot configure while the integration is disabled or not loaded.

data_description.llm_hass_api: Allow Claude to control Home Assistant devices and services.
data_description.name: Name for this conversation agent.
data_description.prompt: Instructions for how Claude should respond. Supports templates.

data_description.model_hint: Which model to use: auto (default Sonnet), fast (Haiku), default (Sonnet), or smart (Opus).

addon_unreachable.title: Claude CLI addon unreachable
addon_unreachable.description: The Claude CLI addon bridge is not responding. Verify that the addon is running and that the bridge URL is correct.

cli_not_authenticated.title: Claude CLI not authenticated
cli_not_authenticated.description: The Claude CLI is not authenticated. SSH into the addon and run `claude setup-token` to authenticate with your Claude subscription.

bridge_error.message: Claude CLI bridge returned error status {status}.

bridge_unreachable.message: Failed to communicate with the Claude CLI bridge.

structured_response_parse_error.message: Claude CLI returned a response that could not be parsed as structured data.

reload_environment.name: Reload environment
reload_environment.description: Reload CLAUDE.md, settings.json, and MCP configuration from disk on the addon.
